quote: The school materials program changed everything for my children. They finally had the books and supplies they needed to keep up in class.
author: Fatou Jallow

quote: Volunteering with BethGold showed me how much of a difference a single afternoon of teamwork can make in a community that's been overlooked.
author: Momodou Ceesay

quote: The medical outreach team treated my mother with so much dignity and care. We didn't think we could afford a checkup this year.
author: Isatou Sanneh

quote: The vocational training gave me real, usable skills. I've since started my own small tailoring business.
author: Lamin Touray
